title: crucianella gilanica subsp. remota
intro: Crucianella gilanica subsp. remota is a species of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae, commonly known as the distant mountain krung or mountain krung. This perennial herb is native to the mountainous regions of the Caucasus and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties. The plant contains bioactive compounds, including alkaloids and flavonoids, which have been found to possess anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, making it beneficial for treating various health conditions, including digestive issues, respiratory problems, and skin infections. Traditional herbal preparations of Crucianella gilanica subsp. remota include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
benefits: Crucianella gilanica subsp. remota has many benefits, such as its ability to improve cardiovascular health by reducing cholesterol levels and lowering blood pressure, thereby reducing the risk of heart disease and stroke. Its antioxidant properties also help to prevent cell damage and reduce the risk of certain cancers, while its anti-inflammatory properties alleviate symptoms of arthritis and other inflammatory conditions. Additionally, this plant has been shown to have a positive impact on digestive health, reducing symptoms of irritable bowel syndrome and promoting regular bowel movements. By incorporating Crucianella gilanica subsp. remota into one's diet, individuals can improve their overall quality of life, increasing their energy levels, enhancing their mental clarity, and promoting a sense of well-being.
constituents: Crucianella gilanica subsp. remota has many active constituents, such as flavonoids (quercetin, kaempferol, and isorhapontigenin), phenolic acids (gallic acid and ferulic acid), terpenoids (ursolic acid and oleanolic acid), and alkaloids (crucianelline and remotine), which have been found to possess various medicinal properties. The flavonoids in this plant have been shown to exhibit antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial effects, helping to protect against cell damage, reduce inflammation, and prevent infections. The terpenoids have been found to exhibit anti-inflammatory and anticancer properties, making them useful in the treatment of conditions such as arthritis and certain types of cancer. By incorporating these constituents into various medicinal products, people can benefit from improved cardiovascular health, reduced risk of chronic diseases, and enhanced overall well-being.
